content.en:
The Ancient Heavenly Palace, in a palace.

Ye Tian and Huang Zu chatted happily, as if the conflict just now had never happened.

"Lord of Endless, what are you looking for me?"

The Desolate Ancestor knew very well that an existence like the Endless Lord could not directly break into the Desolate Heavenly Palace.

Of course.

The main thing is that the Ancient Heavenly Palace doesn't know Ye Tian's strength, otherwise it will definitely not stop it.

At this time, Ye Tian said: "Desolate Ancestor, you are the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm who has survived from the ancient times of the Land of Eternity to the present, you should know about the Reincarnation Dark Domain and the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, right?"

"Reincarnation Dark Domain, Reincarnation Celestial!"

The Wild Ancestor was shocked.

He didn't expect Ye Tian to know this.

"You've been to the Dark Realm of Reincarnation???" Arazu asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded.

The Wild Ancestor was surprised: "You are really bold, if you are discovered by the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, you are afraid that you will not die!"

Ye Tian asked again: "Desolate Ancestor, as far as I know, the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan is very powerful, and in addition to the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, there are also races such as the Reincarnation Source Clan, their strength far surpasses our Eternal Land, why didn't they invade the Eternal Land?"

Although there are no good things in the land of eternity, the area is also large enough, and there are countless creatures, and if you occupy it at a small price, you can have a large number of slaves, which is also very good for the reincarnation celestial clan!

Therefore, he was a little puzzled why the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan did not invade the land of eternity.

Of course, he can ask the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, but if he asks too much, Ao Chen's copy body may be targeted in the future, and it will be inconvenient to go to the Innocent Abyss.

He still didn't want the Reincarnation Celestial Clan to know, so it was the fastest way to ask the Desolate Ancestor.

The Desolate Ancestor did not hide it, and directly revealed: "It's not that the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan and the Reincarnation Origin Ancestor don't want to invade the land of the Eternal Side, but they don't dare! The Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords on the side of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan can't enter our Eternal Other, and even if the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords want to come over, their strength will be suppressed." If they sent a large number of Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, as well as a large number of Origin Upper Realm Overlords to forcibly invade, they would suffer heavy losses! Of course, the most important reason was that the Origin Ancestor had signed an agreement with the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, the Reincarnation Source Clan, and the Reincarnation Clan, not allowing them to break into the land of the Eternal Shore. "

"What, the agreement between the Origin Ancestor and the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The Origin Ancestor was just a Nine-Time Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and he was able to get the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan to sign an agreement, and they really didn't invade the land of Eternity, how did this happen?

Desolate Ancestor said again: "You should be very curious, how did the Origin Ancestor do it, right? In fact, the Origin Ancestor is not an ordinary Nine-Awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlord, he has killed more than double-digit Nine Origin Upper Realm Overlords, which truly shocked the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, the Reincarnation Source Clan, and the Reincarnation Mystery Clan, so that these three clans did not dare to enter the land of eternity. And when the Origin Clan failed to impact the higher realm and was about to fall, the Origin Ancestor changed the rules of the Eternal Beyond Land and suppressed the entire Eternal Beyond Land and the ruins of reincarnation with his body, which made the Nine Awakenings of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan's Origin Upper Realm Overlord unable to enter the Eternal Realm. But we can enter the territory of the reincarnation celestial clan and the reincarnation source clan. Of course, we don't dare to go over, the difference in strength is too big!"

"The Origin Ancestor is so powerful!!!

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

The Desolate Ancestor smiled and said: "The Origin Ancestor is naturally powerful, in fact, before the Origin Ancestor was born, the land on the other side of eternity was only a slave area for the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, the Reincarnation Source Clan, etc., and countless races were their slaves. But when the Origin Ancestor was born, imitate them and embark on the path of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord, so that he can compete with them. It can be said that if we are the ancestors, we may be like the slave race under the command of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, and we will not have a chance to advance to a higher realm, let alone break through to the current realm!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

The Origin Ancestor was also a slave of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, the Reincarnation Origin Clan, and the Reincarnation Clan, and at that time, it was estimated that except for these three races, no other race could become the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and they were ant-like existences.

As a result, these three races did not attach importance to the slave races.

However, the Origin Ancestor forcibly created three paths, allowing a group of slaves to give birth to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and he even reached the realm of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, confronted the three clans, killed more than ten Origin Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the same level, and forcibly let the land on the other side of eternity out of the control of the three clans.

It can be said that this credit alone is incomparable.

To this day, the reincarnation of the Heavenly Clan still does not dare to break into the land of eternity.

"Desolate Ancestor, the races in some of the treasures in the land of Eternity are all from the slave races over there?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"Yes!" Wasted Ancestor nodded, "These slave races are not restricted, they can enter the land of the Eternal Shore at any time, but the agreement of all races also includes these slave races, and each slave race has a limit on the number, and it is impossible for them all to enter the land of the Eternal Shore." The slave race under the command of the three races of reincarnation has a very miserable life, and those slaves naturally want to enter the land of the other side of eternity, but if they really let all of them in, the three races of reincarnation will definitely not stop, and they will definitely attack the land of the other side of eternity at all costs, and we will be in danger at that time. And to limit the number, the number of slave races in the land of the Eternal Shore is less than one ten-thousandth, or even one in hundreds of thousands, so the three races of reincarnation naturally don't matter. "

Ye Tian nodded.

The number of slave races in the land of the Eternal Shore is indeed very small, and there are not many Origin Upper Realm Overlords, compared to the slave races in the Reincarnation Dark Domain, the number is much less, and there are too many Origin Upper Realm Overlords over there.

In contrast, the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan naturally does not attach importance to the land of the eternal shore, but they definitely do not want the land of the eternal shore to develop.

At this time, Ye Tian asked the reincarnation gold worm again.

"Desolate Ancestor, what's going on with the reincarnation golden worm, isn't it also the life of the area over there of the three reincarnation clans?"

Ye Tian asked.

"How to say it, the reincarnation golden worm is considered to be in the gap between the ruins of reincarnation and the reincarnation domain where the three reincarnation clans are located, and it belongs to a special life, but the reincarnation golden worm cannot enter the land of eternity, which is also the means arranged by the origin ancestor. Otherwise, we won't be able to stop so many reincarnation golden worms from breaking into the land of eternity. Arazu introduced.
